title: Mamba: Linear-Time Sequence Modeling with Selective State Spaces

defines.name: Mamba
defines.definition: A simplified end-to-end neural network architecture that integrates selective state space models for linear-time sequence modeling without attention or MLP blocks.

defines.name: selective state space models
defines.definition: State space models whose parameters are conditioned on the input to enable content-based selection and selective propagation or forgetting of information along the sequence.

problem: Transformer-based sequence models have quadratic scaling, while prior efficient sequence models have been unable to match attention on discrete, information-dense modalities like language because they cannot perform content-based reasoning.
